title: NeoVillagers-Designer
description: Mod adds a new villager job "Designer", adding a new table and additional blocks to decor the world and avoid using them as job's table when create castles in a village, for example.
body:
This mmod was created to add the same blocks as designer/decoration, so now you can use barrels, cauldrons and composters in your villages and castles and allow the villagers walking around without take care that they change the job´s site.

This mod includes a new villager: The designer and its table: The Designer table.
![The designer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe9d981b646cb37810594f360d3a053bc424f8f8.png)
